mentions.note: Caller up 32%; Cramer says hold—hasn't ignited yet but will rotate higher as other semiconductors cool; specific rotation play poised to run.
Richard asks about chip cyclicality; TXN is cyclical. Can't buy cyclical chips (have to buy then sell). Prefer to hold secular chip plays instead.
Industrial and data center chip supply tight; stock burst higher ~10% on management commentary; momentum intact.

Analog chip maker issued tremendous Q1 guidance despite modest Q4; leveraged to industrial/auto recovery; data-center business up 64% YoY; sequential earnings growth reverses typical seasonal decline—first positive turn since 1985.
Preferred semiconductor play over Rambus; better positioned analog/mixed-signal supplier.
